items.headline: UN 'encouraged' by talk of possible US-Iran ceasefire deal
items.excerpt: The United Nations continues to monitor developments amid conflicting reports on Friday of a possible ceasefire deal between the United States and Iran, the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General said in New York.

items.headline: Middle East LIVE: Diplomacy in focus as escalation 'reverberates across borders and continents', warns UN chief
items.excerpt: Nearly four months after the latest Middle East crisis erupted and despite a fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran, tensions continue to reverberate across the region and beyond. The UN Security Council held a high-level debate on advancing political solutions in the Middle East.

items.headline: NPT Safeguards Agreement with Iran: Resolution to the IAEA Board of Governors, June 2026
items.excerpt: Statement on behalf of France, Germany, the UK and United States (the Quad) to the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) Board meeting introducing a resolution on Iran's implementation of its obligations under its Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty Safeguards Agreement.

items.headline: NPT Safeguards Agreement with Iran: Quad statement to the IAEA Board of Governors, June 2026
items.excerpt: France, Germany, the UK and the United States (the Quad) delivered a joint statement to the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) Board on Iran's Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT) Safeguards Agreement.

items.headline: Joint statement on Iranian State Threats and HAYI-claimed attacks
items.excerpt: Joint statement from 24 countries on state threats relating to Iranian security services and the condemnation of recent Harakat Ashab al-Yamin al-Islamiya (HAYI) claimed-attacks across Europe.

items.headline: The full and effective implementation of reinstated UN sanctions on Iran remains essential: UK statement at the UN Security Council
items.excerpt: Statement by Ambassador James Kariuki, UK Chargé d'Affaires to the UN, at the UN Security Council meeting on Iran.

items.headline: Middle East LIVE: Diplomacy in focus as escalation ‘reverberates across borders and continents’, warns UN chief
items.excerpt: Nearly four months after the latest Middle East crisis erupted and despite a fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran, tensions continue to reverberate across the region and beyond. The UN Security Council held a high-level debate on advancing political solutions in the Middle East on We

fa.headline: خاورمیانه زنده: دبیرکل سازمان ملل متحد هشدار داد که دیپلماسی در کانون توجه است، زیرا تشدید تنش‌ها «در مرزها و قاره‌ها طنین‌انداز می‌شود».
fa.excerpt: تقریباً چهار ماه پس از وقوع آخرین بحران خاورمیانه و با وجود آتش‌بس شکننده بین ایالات متحده و ایران، تنش‌ها همچنان در سراسر منطقه و فراتر از آن طنین‌انداز است. شورای امنیت سازمان ملل متحد روز سه‌شنبه بحثی در سطح بالا در مورد پیشبرد راه‌حل‌های سیاسی در خاورمیانه برگزار کرد.

items.headline: Der Irankrieg verändert die Golfregion – Europa muss handeln
items.excerpt: Ein Kriegsende am Golf würde Europa die Chance eröffnen, politisch und wirtschaftlich Einfluss zurückzugewinnen. Volker Perthes, Ex-UN-Untergeneralsekretär, zeigt, wo die Anknüpfungspunkte liegen.

fa.headline: Der Irankrieg verändert die Golfregion – Europa muss handeln
fa.excerpt: Ein Kriegsende am Golf würde Europa die Chance eröffnen، politisch und wirtschaftlich Einfluss zurückzugewinnen. Volker Perthes، سابق سازمان ملل متحد Untergeneralsekretär، zeigt، wo die Anknüpfungspunkte liegen.
